data.title: As a plugin developer, I can trust that the plugin directory contains only shipped artifacts
data.description:
Scope: Migrate all dev-team artifacts out of plugins/dso/ to project-local directories. This is the walking skeleton — all other stories in this epic depend on this clean state.

Files to migrate:
- plugins/dso/docs/designs/* → docs/designs/ (EXCEPT cascade-replan-protocol.md — see special case)
- plugins/dso/docs/findings/* → docs/findings/
- plugins/dso/docs/archive/* → docs/archive/
- plugins/dso/tests/* → tests/ (after classification — see done definitions)

Special case: cascade-replan-protocol.md moves from plugins/dso/docs/designs/ to plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/ (stays in plugin; sprint SKILL.md references it there).

Also update all internal file references pointing to old paths:
- CLAUDE.md: remove/replace reference to plugins/dso/docs/designs/
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (3 occurrences): update cascade-replan-protocol.md path to plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/cascade-replan-protocol.md
- plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md: remove reference to playwright-cli-spike-report.md
- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md: update output path from plugins/dso/docs/designs/<uuid>/ to docs/designs/<uuid>/

Done Definitions:
- [ ] Before any files are moved, a ticket comment documents each file in plugins/dso/tests/ with disposition: migrate-to-tests / keep-as-plugin-self-test / delete
- [ ] cascade-replan-protocol.md exists at plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/cascade-replan-protocol.md
- [ ] plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/ directory exists and is registered in the allowlist (S2)
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/designs/ directory is empty or removed (cascade-replan-protocol.md relocated within plugin; no remaining files)
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/findings/ directory is empty or removed
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/archive/ directory is empty or removed
- [ ] plugins/dso/tests/ is empty, removed, or contains only classified plugin self-tests
- [ ] All migrated files exist at their new project-local paths
- [ ] git grep -r "plugins/dso/docs/designs\|plugins/dso/docs/findings\|plugins/dso/docs/archive" -- "*.md" "*.sh" returns no matches
- [ ] Sprint SKILL.md, playwright-debug SKILL.md, ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md, and CLAUDE.md all reference new paths

Considerations:
- [Maintainability] Migrate atomically in a single commit — partial migration leaves broken references that confuse agents navigating the codebase
- [Testing] The grep gate scopes to *.md and *.sh only — source code may legitimately reference these paths during transition

Escalation Policy: Escalate when blocked — proceed unless a significant assumption could send implementation in the wrong direction; document all assumptions made without escalating.
